case_title: JOHN M KELLY VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ET AL
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION RE: RESP.'S RETURN TO VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY PETITIONER KELLY, JOHN M
RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITYS REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF ITS OPPOSITION TO VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE (TRANSACTION ID # 56734989)
REPLY IN MANDAMUS PROCEEDING FILED BY PETITIONER KELLY, JOHN M
ORDER CORRECTING CLERICAL ERRORS IN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE UPON ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-18-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS DENIED. SFHA HAS FULFILLED ITS OBLIGATIONS UNDER THE PUBLIC RECORDS ACT SUCH THAT NO MORE IS REQUIRED OF IT WITH RESPECT TO PETITIONER'S REQUESTS. RESPONDENTS SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR #11185; DEPT. 302 (302/EHG)
ORDER RETURNING ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD
DECLARATION OF JOHN M KELLY ON NTC OF PROVIDED TO RESP.'S RE EXPARTE APPLICATION FOR AN ALT WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY PETITIONER KELLY, JOHN M
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PETITIONER KELLY, JOHN M
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SET FOR FEB-18-2015 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS CONTINUED FROM FEB-18-2015 TO FEB-25-2015, AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 18, 2015 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Feb-25-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Petitioner JOHN M. KELLY, Tel No. (415) 536-1476 appearing in pro per;
Atty. JAMES J. ISON of Cholakian & Associates, APC, Tel No. (650) 290-4223 appearing for Respondents San Francisco Housing Authority and Barbara Smith.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court denied Petitioner's request for a statement of decision. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner John M. Kelly's Petition for Order To Show Cause Upon Alternative Writ of Mandate is denied. SFHA has fulfilled its obligations under the Public Records Act such that no more is required of it with respect to Petitioner's requests. RESPONDENTS SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185 (302/EHG)

Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Feb-18-2015 Continued To Feb-25-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order To Show Cause is continued to February 25, 2015 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 18, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
